title: xerothamnella herbacea
intro: Xerothamnella herbacea, also known as the sandpaper bush or coastal verbena, is a shrub-like plant native to eastern Australia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiviral, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Xerothamnella herbacea include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to promote relaxation and overall well-being.
